en: As soon as King Hezekiah heard it, he tore his clothes and covered himself with sackcloth and went into the house of the LORD.
zh: 希西家王聽見了，就撕裂衣服，披上麻布，進了耶和華的殿。

en: And he sent Eliakim, who was over the household, and Shebna the secretary, and the senior priests, covered with sackcloth, to the prophet Isaiah the son of Amoz.
zh: 他差派管家以利亞敬、書記舍伯那和祭司中的長老，都披上麻布，去見亞摩斯的兒子以賽亞先知。

en: They said to him, "Thus says Hezekiah, 'This day is a day of distress, of rebuke, and of disgrace; children have come to the point of birth, and there is no strength to bring them forth.
zh: 他們對他說：“希西家這樣說：‘今日是急難、責罰和凌辱的日子，就像嬰孩快要出生的時候，卻沒有氣力生出來一樣。

en: It may be that the LORD your God will hear the words of the Rabshakeh, whom his master the king of Assyria has sent to mock the living God, and will rebuke the words that the LORD your God has heard; therefore lift up your prayer for the remnant that is left.'"
zh: 也許耶和華你的 神聽見拉伯沙基的話，就是他的主人亞述王派他來辱罵永活的 神的話；耶和華你的 神會因他所聽見的話斥責他；因此，求你為餘剩下來的人獻上禱告。’”

en: When the servants of King Hezekiah came to Isaiah,
zh: 希西家王的臣僕就去見以賽亞，

en: Isaiah said to them, "Say to your master, 'Thus says the LORD: Do not be afraid because of the words that you have heard, with which the young men of the king of Assyria have reviled me.
zh: 以賽亞對他們說：“要對你們的主人這樣說：‘耶和華這樣說：你不要因為聽見亞述王的僕人褻瀆我的話而害怕。

en: Behold, I will put a spirit in him, so that he shall hear a rumor and return to his own land, and I will make him fall by the sword in his own land.'"
zh: 看哪！我必使靈進入他裡面，以致他聽見風聲就歸回本地；我必使他在那裡倒在刀下。’”

en: The Rabshakeh returned, and found the king of Assyria fighting against Libnah, for he had heard that the king had left Lachish.
zh: 拉伯沙基回去的時候，正遇見亞述王攻打立拿；原來他早已聽聞亞述王拔營離開了拉吉。

en: Now the king heard concerning Tirhakah king of Cush, "He has set out to fight against you." And when he heard it, he sent messengers to Hezekiah, saying,
zh: 亞述王聽到關於古實王特哈加的報告說：“他出來要與你爭戰”；亞述王聽見了，就差派使者去見希西家，說：

en: "Thus shall you speak to Hezekiah king of Judah: 'Do not let your God in whom you trust deceive you by promising that Jerusalem will not be given into the hand of the king of Assyria.
zh: “你們要對猶大王希西家這樣說：不要給你所倚靠的 神欺騙你說：耶路撒冷必不交在亞述王的手裡。

en: Behold, you have heard what the kings of Assyria have done to all lands, devoting them to destruction. And shall you be delivered?
zh: 你必定聽過亞述列王向列國所行的，就是把她們完全毀滅，難道你還有救嗎？

en: Have the gods of the nations delivered them, the nations that my fathers destroyed, Gozan, Haran, Rezeph, and the people of Eden who were in Telassar?
zh: 我列祖所毀滅的國，有歌撒、哈蘭、利色和在提．拉撒的伊甸人，這些國的神曾拯救她們嗎？

en: Where is the king of Hamath, the king of Arpad, the king of the city of Sepharvaim, the king of Hena, or the king of Ivvah?'"
zh: 哈馬的王、亞珥拔的王、西法瓦音城的王、希拿和以瓦的王，現在都在哪裡呢？”

en: Hezekiah received the letter from the hand of the messengers, and read it; and Hezekiah went up to the house of the LORD, and spread it before the LORD.
zh: 希西家從使者手裡接過信卷，讀完了，就上耶和華的殿，在耶和華面前把信卷展開。

en: And Hezekiah prayed to the LORD:
zh: 希西家向耶和華禱告說：

en: "O LORD of hosts, God of Israel, who is enthroned above the cherubim, you are the God, you alone, of all the kingdoms of the earth; you have made heaven and earth.
zh: “萬軍之耶和華，以色列的 神，坐在二基路伯中間的啊！唯獨你是地上萬國的 神；你創造了天地。

en: Incline your ear, O LORD, and hear; open your eyes, O LORD, and see; and hear all the words of Sennacherib, which he has sent to mock the living God.
zh: 耶和華啊，求你側耳而聽！耶和華啊，求你開眼察看！要聽西拿基立的一切話，就是那差派使者來辱罵永活的 神的。

en: Truly, O LORD, the kings of Assyria have laid waste all the nations and their lands,
zh: 耶和華啊！亞述列王果然使列國和他們的土地變成荒涼，

en: and have cast their gods into the fire. For they were no gods, but the work of men's hands, wood and stone. Therefore they were destroyed.
zh: 又把列國的神都扔進火中；因為他們不是神，只是人手所做的，不過是木頭和石頭，所以他們就滅絕了他們。

en: So now, O LORD our God, save us from his hand, that all the kingdoms of the earth may know that you alone are the LORD."
zh: 耶和華我們的 神啊！現在求你拯救我們脫離亞述王的手，使地上萬國都知道唯有你耶和華是 神。”

en: Then Isaiah the son of Amoz sent to Hezekiah, saying, "Thus says the LORD, the God of Israel: Because you have prayed to me concerning Sennacherib king of Assyria,
zh: 亞摩斯的兒子以賽亞就派人去見希西家，說：“耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：‘因為你向我禱告關於亞述王西拿基立的事，

en: this is the word that the LORD has spoken concerning him: "' She despises you, she scorns you- the virgin daughter of Zion; she wags her head behind you- the daughter of Jerusalem.
zh: 耶和華就有以下的話攻擊他，說： 錫安的處女 藐視你，嗤笑你； 耶路撒冷的女子 在你背後搖頭。

en: "'Whom have you mocked and reviled? Against whom have you raised your voice and lifted your eyes to the heights? Against the Holy One of Israel!
zh: 你辱罵誰、褻瀆誰？ 你揚起聲音， 又高舉眼目，要攻擊誰？ 就是攻擊以色列的聖者。

en: By your servants you have mocked the Lord, and you have said, With my many chariots I have gone up the heights of the mountains, to the far recesses of Lebanon, to cut down its tallest cedars, its choicest cypresses, to come to its remotest height, its most fruitful forest.
zh: 你藉著你的臣僕辱罵主； 你又說：我率領我眾多的戰車上了群山的高峰， 到了黎巴嫩極深之處。 我砍伐其中高大的香柏樹和佳美的松樹； 我去到極高之處，進入肥田般的樹林。

en: I dug wells and drank waters, to dry up with the sole of my foot all the streams of Egypt.
zh: 我挖井和喝水； 我用我的腳掌 踏乾埃及的河流。’

en: "'Have you not heard that I determined it long ago? I planned from days of old what now I bring to pass, that you should make fortified cities crash into heaps of ruins,
zh: 耶和華說：‘難道你沒有聽見 古時我所安排， 往昔所計劃的嗎？ 現在我才使它成就， 使堅固的城鎮荒廢，變作亂堆。

en: while their inhabitants, shorn of strength, are dismayed and confounded, and have become like plants of the field and like tender grass, like grass on the housetops, blighted before it is grown.
zh: 因此，其中的居民軟弱無力， 驚惶羞愧， 像田間的蔬菜和青綠的草， 又像房頂上的草，還沒有長起來，就乾焦了。

en: "'I know your sitting down and your going out and coming in, and your raging against me.
zh: 你坐下， 你出，你入， 你向我發烈怒，我都知道。

en: Because you have raged against me and your complacency has come to my ears, I will put my hook in your nose and my bit in your mouth, and I will turn you back on the way by which you came.'
zh: 因為你向我發烈怒， 又因你的狂傲達到我耳中， 我要把鈎子放進你的鼻孔， 把嚼環放進你的嘴裡， 使你從你來的路上回去。

en: "And this shall be the sign for you: this year you shall eat what grows of itself, and in the second year what springs from that. Then in the third year sow and reap, and plant vineyards, and eat their fruit.
zh: 希西家啊！這要作你的兆頭：今年你們要吃自生的，明年還要吃自長的，後年你們就要撒種，要收割，要栽種葡萄園，吃園中的果子。

en: And the surviving remnant of the house of Judah shall again take root downward and bear fruit upward.
zh: 猶大家所逃脫的餘民，必再向下扎根，往上結果。

en: For out of Jerusalem shall go a remnant, and out of Mount Zion a band of survivors. The zeal of the LORD of hosts will do this.
zh: 因為餘下的人必從耶路撒冷出來，逃脫的人必從錫安山出來。萬軍之耶和華的熱心必作成這事。’

en: "Therefore thus says the LORD concerning the king of Assyria: He shall not come into this city or shoot an arrow there or come before it with a shield or cast up a siege mound against it.
zh: 所以耶和華這樣論到亞述王，說：‘他必不會來到這城，也不會在這裡射箭；不會拿著盾牌來到城前，也不會築土壘攻城。

en: By the way that he came, by the same he shall return, and he shall not come into this city, declares the LORD.
zh: 他從哪條路來，也必從哪條路回去；他必不得進入這城；這是耶和華的宣告。

en: For I will defend this city to save it, for my own sake and for the sake of my servant David."
zh: 因我為自己的緣故，又為我僕人大衛的緣故，必保護這城，拯救這城。’”

en: And the angel of the LORD went out and struck down a hundred and eighty-five thousand in the camp of the Assyrians. And when people arose early in the morning, behold, these were all dead bodies.
zh: 於是耶和華的使者出去，在亞述營中擊殺了十八萬五千人；到了早晨，有人起來，所見的都是死屍。

en: Then Sennacherib king of Assyria departed and returned home and lived at Nineveh.
zh: 亞述王西拿基立就拔營離去，返回本地，住在尼尼微。

en: And as he was worshiping in the house of Nisroch his god, Adrammelech and Sharezer, his sons, struck him down with the sword. And after they escaped into the land of Ararat, Esarhaddon his son reigned in his place.
zh: 他在自己的神尼斯洛廟裡叩拜的時候，他的兒子亞得米勒和沙利色用刀殺了他，然後逃到亞拉臘地。他的兒子以撒哈頓接續他作王。
